title: [codereview-pass2 P4] coap_dtn.c deaddrop_get buffer too small
description: Uses 64 byte senml buffer; location.c uses 128 for base+records (LOCATION_SENML_MAX). SenML with base_name could exceed. Update to 128 and add #define like location. File:lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_dtn.c:125. P4 style/consistency. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-92oj
close_reason: Fixed: buffer now DEADDROP_SENML_MAX=128, uses senml_encode_dtn_count.
